mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oj_problem_comment_like (comment_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM oj_problem_comment_like WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, comment_id AS commentId, user_id AS userId, create_time AS createTime FROM oj_problem_comment_like WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
